title: American Tower (AMT)Intrinsic Value
description: A transparent, step-by-step discounted cash flow valuation of American Tower Corporation. Using actual FY2025 financials to arrive at a single fair value estimate for AMT shares.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
">
Mathematically derived using the 4-year CAGR of Operating Cash Flow (from $4,820M in FY2021 to $5,464M in FY2025).

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
">
Mathematically derived using the 4-year CAGR of Operating Cash Flow (from $4,820M in FY2021 to $5,464M in FY2025).

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
